subcodes.first_line: O Amin! Upon thee be My glory! In these days time is even as a faithful bird, nay rather, as the supreme elixir in the eyes of the people of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امین علیک بهائی این ایام وقت بمثابه طیر وفا یا اکسیر اعظم نزد اهل دنیا
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @stories; anecdotes, @the power of words; of speech, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
